description: The open, public scenario suite for the Modelpin Report. Discriminating by design: scenarios sit at the seams where competent models diverge (reasoning traps, multi-constraint formatting, sarcasm, prompt-injection, ambiguous tool-use, borderline refusal), so a real model launch can surface real, reproducible behavior change rather than the 50/50-unchanged false comfort of an easy suite. Two breadth anchors (summarize_semantic, tooluse_guarded_action) are retained to prove the suite stays QUIET on equivalent behavior, not only loud on traps. Versioned and content-hashed for reproducibility. Strictly disjoint from examples/suite/ (the held-out false-positive measurement set) and examples/calibration/ (the semantic-judge threshold set).
